Text.Text: Alphabetical ship list
Ship Finder - Dynamic User Menu Test
Ship Finder
The menu is selected from the current corporation's ship naming convention.
Trade routes
Choose the first island code.
Trade route destinations
Choose the second island code.
Trade-route ships
Sir Locksley ship finder
Choose an exact ship. Blank rows mean that the current page has fewer ships.
[X] Close
▲ Categories
▲ First islands
▲ Routes
◀◀ Earlier choices
Later choices ▶▶
Active trade routes
Trade ships needing attention
Runners
Warships
Other ships

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3P")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local z=p*3+1;local i,n,l,v=0,0,"",nil;for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=l then l=r[1];i=i+1;if i==z then v=r[3];n=0 elseif i>z then break end end;if i==z then n=n+1 end end;return v and(v.."... ("..n..")")or"[N/A]"end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3P")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local z=p*3+2;local i,n,l,v=0,0,"",nil;for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=l then l=r[1];i=i+1;if i==z then v=r[3];n=0 elseif i>z then break end end;if i==z then n=n+1 end end;return v and(v.."... ("..n..")")or"[N/A]"end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3P")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local z=p*3+3;local i,n,l,v=0,0,"",nil;for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=l then l=r[1];i=i+1;if i==z then v=r[3];n=0 elseif i>z then break end end;if i==z then n=n+1 end end;return v and(v.."... ("..n..")")or"[N/A]"end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3R")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local z=p*3+1;local i,j,n=0,0,0;local a,b,u,v="","",nil,nil;for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=a then a=r[1];b="";i=i+1;j=0 end;if i==f then if r[2]~=b then b=r[2];j=j+1 end;if j==z then u,v,n=r[3],r[4],n+1 elseif j>z then break end elseif i>f then break end end;return u and(u.."-"..v.." ("..n..")")or"[N/A]"end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3R")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local z=p*3+2;local i,j,n=0,0,0;local a,b,u,v="","",nil,nil;for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=a then a=r[1];b="";i=i+1;j=0 end;if i==f then if r[2]~=b then b=r[2];j=j+1 end;if j==z then u,v,n=r[3],r[4],n+1 elseif j>z then break end elseif i>f then break end end;return u and(u.."-"..v.." ("..n..")")or"[N/A]"end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3R")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local z=p*3+3;local i,j,n=0,0,0;local a,b,u,v="","",nil,nil;for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=a then a=r[1];b="";i=i+1;j=0 end;if i==f then if r[2]~=b then b=r[2];j=j+1 end;if j==z then u,v,n=r[3],r[4],n+1 elseif j>z then break end elseif i>f then break end end;return u and(u.."-"..v.." ("..n..")")or"[N/A]"end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local s=Variables:GetVariable("S3S")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local g=(GameSession and GameSession.SessionGUID)or 0;local k=g.."|"..c.."|"..f.."|"..s.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[4]<y[4]end);v={"[N/A]","[N/A]",""};local i,j,n=0,0,0;local a,b="","";for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=a then a=r[1];b="";i=i+1;j=0 end;if i==f then if r[2]~=b then b=r[2];j=j+1;n=0 end;if j==s then n=n+1;local z=p*2+n;if z==p*2+1 then v[1]=r[3]elseif z==p*2+2 then v[2]=r[3];break end elseif j>s then break end elseif i>f then break end end;v[3]=n>(p+1)*2 and"More ships ▶"or"";ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[1]end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local s=Variables:GetVariable("S3S")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local g=(GameSession and GameSession.SessionGUID)or 0;local k=g.."|"..c.."|"..f.."|"..s.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[4]<y[4]end);v={"[N/A]","[N/A]",""};local i,j,n=0,0,0;local a,b="","";for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=a then a=r[1];b="";i=i+1;j=0 end;if i==f then if r[2]~=b then b=r[2];j=j+1;n=0 end;if j==s then n=n+1;local z=p*2+n;if z==p*2+1 then v[1]=r[3]elseif z==p*2+2 then v[2]=r[3];break end elseif j>s then break end elseif i>f then break end end;v[3]=n>(p+1)*2 and"More ships ▶"or"";ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[2]end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local k=GameSession.SessionGUID.."|"..c.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local r={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then n=tostring(n);local z;if n:match("^[LlAa]_[^_]+_[^_]+_%d+$")then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;z=(t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2 else local l=n:lower();if l:match("^runner%s")or l:match("%srunner$")then z=3 elseif o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit then z=4 else z=5 end end;if z==c then r[#r+1]={n,n:lower().."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end;table.sort(r,function(a,b)return a[2]<b[2]end);v={"","",""};for i=1,3 do local a=r[p*3+i];if a then v[i]=a[1]end end;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[1]end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local k=GameSession.SessionGUID.."|"..c.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local r={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then n=tostring(n);local z;if n:match("^[LlAa]_[^_]+_[^_]+_%d+$")then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;z=(t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2 else local l=n:lower();if l:match("^runner%s")or l:match("%srunner$")then z=3 elseif o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit then z=4 else z=5 end end;if z==c then r[#r+1]={n,n:lower().."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end;table.sort(r,function(a,b)return a[2]<b[2]end);v={"","",""};for i=1,3 do local a=r[p*3+i];if a then v[i]=a[1]end end;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[2]end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local k=GameSession.SessionGUID.."|"..c.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local r={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then n=tostring(n);local z;if n:match("^[LlAa]_[^_]+_[^_]+_%d+$")then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;z=(t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2 else local l=n:lower();if l:match("^runner%s")or l:match("%srunner$")then z=3 elseif o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit then z=4 else z=5 end end;if z==c then r[#r+1]={n,n:lower().."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end;table.sort(r,function(a,b)return a[2]<b[2]end);v={"","",""};for i=1,3 do local a=r[p*3+i];if a then v[i]=a[1]end end;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[3]end)()}
{(function() local page=Variables:GetVariable("S3P") or 0; return page>0 and "◀◀ Earlier choices" or "" end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3P")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local n,l=0,"";for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=l then l=r[1];n=n+1 end end;return n>(p+1)*3 and"Later choices ▶▶"or""end)()}
{(function() local page=Variables:GetVariable("S3R") or 0; return page>0 and "◀◀ Earlier choices" or "" end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3R")or 0;local R={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local q=o.Nameable;local n=q and q.Name;if n then local a,b,d=n:match("^[LlAa]_([^_]+)_([^_]+)_(%d+)$");if a then local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;if((t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute and not t.IsPaused)and 1 or 2)==c then local x,y=a:lower(),b:lower();R[#R+1]={x,y,a,b,n,x.."|"..y.."|"..("%020d"):format(tonumber(d)or 0).."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end end;table.sort(R,function(x,y)return x[6]<y[6]end);local i,n=0,0;local a,b="","";for _,r in ipairs(R)do if r[1]~=a then a=r[1];b="";i=i+1 end;if i==f and r[2]~=b then b=r[2];n=n+1 elseif i>f then break end end;return n>(p+1)*3 and"Later choices ▶▶"or""end)()}
{(function() local page=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q") or 0; return page>0 and "◀ Previous ships" or "" end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local f=Variables:GetVariable("S3F")or 0;local s=Variables:GetVariable("S3S")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local g=(GameSession and GameSession.SessionGUID)or 0;local k=g.."|"..c.."|"..f.."|"..s.."|"..p;local C=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache;local v=C and C[k];return v and v[3]or""end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local g=(GameSession and GameSession.SessionGUID)or 0;local k="G|"..g.."|"..c.."|"..p;local C=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache;local v=C and C[k];return v and v[4]or""end)()}
Ship Finder - Alphabetical Catalogue
Alphabetical ship finder
Choose the first letter of a ship in the current province. Counts are live.
Alphabetical ship finder
Choose an exact ship. Blank rows mean that the current page has fewer ships.
[X] Close
◀◀ Earlier letters
Later letters ▶▶
[A-Z] Letter index

{(function() local letter="A"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="B"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="C"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="D"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="E"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="F"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="G"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="H"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="I"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="J"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="K"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="L"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="M"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="N"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="O"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="P"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="Q"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="R"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="S"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="T"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="U"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="V"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="W"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="X"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="Y"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local letter="Z"; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable and string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1))==letter then count=count+1 end end; return letter.." ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); if not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$") then count=count+1 end end end; return "Other ("..tostring(count)..")" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+1]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+2]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+3]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local sorted={}; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then table.insert(sorted,object) end end end; local function key(name) return string.gsub(string.lower(tostring(name)),"%d+",function(number) return string.format("%020d",tonumber(number)) end) end; table.sort(sorted,function(a,b) local ak,bk=key(a.Nameable.Name),key(b.Nameable.Name); if ak==bk then return a.ID<b.ID end; return ak<bk end); local object=sorted[(page*4)+4]; return object and tostring(object.Nameable.Name) or "" end)()}
{(function() local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; return page>0 and "◀ Previous ships" or "" end)()}

{(function() local group=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicGroup") or 0; local page=Variables:GetVariable("ShipFinderAlphabeticalDynamicPage") or 0; local count=0; local objects=Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner) or {}; for _,object in pairs(objects) do if object.Nameable then local first=string.upper(string.sub(tostring(object.Nameable.Name),1,1)); local matches=(group>=1 and group<=26 and first==string.char(64+group)) or (group==27 and not string.match(first,"^[A-Z]$")); if matches then count=count+1 end end end; return count>((page+1)*4) and "More ships ▶" or "" end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local k=GameSession.SessionGUID.."|P|"..c.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local r={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local n=o.Nameable and o.Nameable.Name;if n then n=tostring(n);local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;local a=t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute;local u=o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit;local z=(c==1 and a and not t.IsPaused)or(c==2 and(not a or(t and t.IsPaused)))or(c==4 and u)or(c==5 and not u);if z then r[#r+1]={n,n:lower().."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end;table.sort(r,function(a,b)return a[2]<b[2]end);v={"","",""};for i=1,3 do local x=r[p*3+i];if x then v[i]=x[1]end end;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[1]end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local k=GameSession.SessionGUID.."|P|"..c.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local r={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local n=o.Nameable and o.Nameable.Name;if n then n=tostring(n);local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;local a=t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute;local u=o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit;local z=(c==1 and a and not t.IsPaused)or(c==2 and(not a or(t and t.IsPaused)))or(c==4 and u)or(c==5 and not u);if z then r[#r+1]={n,n:lower().."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end;table.sort(r,function(a,b)return a[2]<b[2]end);v={"","",""};for i=1,3 do local x=r[p*3+i];if x then v[i]=x[1]end end;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[2]end)()}

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local k=GameSession.SessionGUID.."|P|"..c.."|"..p;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache or{};local v=ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k];if not v then local r={};for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local n=o.Nameable and o.Nameable.Name;if n then n=tostring(n);local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;local a=t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute;local u=o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit;local z=(c==1 and a and not t.IsPaused)or(c==2 and(not a or(t and t.IsPaused)))or(c==4 and u)or(c==5 and not u);if z then r[#r+1]={n,n:lower().."|"..tostring(o.ID)}end end end;table.sort(r,function(a,b)return a[2]<b[2]end);v={"","",""};for i=1,3 do local x=r[p*3+i];if x then v[i]=x[1]end end;ShipFinderPersonalLabelCache[k]=v end;return v[3]end)()}
Ship Finder
Choose a ship from the current province.

{(function()local c=Variables:GetVariable("S3C")or 0;local p=Variables:GetVariable("S3Q")or 0;local n=0;for _,o in pairs(Scripts:GetObjectGroupByProperty(Properties.ShipModuleOwner)or{})do local t=o.TradeRouteVehicle;local a=t and t.IsAssignedOnTradeRoute;local u=o.Unit and o.Unit.IsMilitaryUnit;if(c==1 and a and not t.IsPaused)or(c==2 and(not a or(t and t.IsPaused)))or(c==4 and u)or(c==5 and not u)then n=n+1 end end;return n>(p+1)*3 and"More ships ▶"or""end)()}
Select this ship and jump to its current position.
Browse another page of ships in this category.
Return to the Ship Finder category list.
Close Ship Finder.
